news.paragraph: Micron is facing recent downward momentum as the broader memory trade cools following a parabolic run. This pullback is reflected in a 5% drop in DRAM ETFs and recent reports of the stock price declining. Options traders should account for this increased volatility and the cooling sentiment in the semiconductor sector.
